NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff's Motion For Assignment Order re: Rights To Payment of Money Due Or To Become Due is granted. No opposition has been filed. (612/HEWLETT)

Off Calendar Aug-11-2005 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF/JUDGMENT CREDITOR AQUENT, INC.'S MOTION For Assignment Order Re: Rights To Payment Of Money Due Or To Become Due.
APPEARANCE: Marisa D'Amico, Esq. of Aires Law Group 200-6676 specially appearing for pltf & moving party; no other appearances.
RULING: The Court vacated its tentative ruling & took the matter off calendar because it is a discovery motion, to be brought before the discovery dept. (301/JLW/ju) Court Reporter Christina Paxton, CSR #1558

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-15-2004 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Aug-26-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Judge: Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: Marta Vallejo, CSR: Vicki Gross #5525
Bob Perkiss, Esq. for Plaintiff: Aquent, Inc.
After hearing the evidence presented and declarations, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant: Net Connectins Consulting Group as follows:
Principal $27,200.00
Interest $4,715.85
Attorney's Fees $660.00
Costs $314.50
for a total of $32,890.35
It is further order that plaintiff takes possession of certain personal property described in attachment 7 of the judgment.
Judgment signed in open court.
